harness.check: (lambda inp, out: (out is None and '-' in inp and ':' in inp and (inp.count(':') == 1 and int(inp.split(':')[1]) < 0 or inp.count(':') == 2 and int(inp.split(':')[1]) < 0 or inp.count(':') == 2 and int(inp.split(':')[2]) < 0)) or (out is not None and (out.days == int(inp.split(' ')[0]) if ' ' in inp else 0) and (out.seconds == (int(inp.split(':')[0]) * 3600 + int(inp.split(':')[1]) * 60 + (int(inp.split(':')[2].split('.')[0]) if '.' in inp.split(':')[2] else int(inp.split(':')[2]))) if ':' in inp else int(inp)) * (1 if '-' not in inp else -1) and (out.microseconds == (int(inp.split('.')[1]) * 1000) if '.' in inp else 0))) (inp, out)

harness.make_input: (datetime(rng.randint(1970, 2050), rng.randint(1, 12), rng.randint(1, 28), rng.randint(0, 23), rng.randint(0, 59), rng.randint(0, 59)), dateformat.format(datetime(rng.randint(1970, 2050), rng.randint(1, 12), rng.randint(1, 28), rng.randint(0, 23), rng.randint(0, 59), rng.randint(0, 59)), 'l, d-M-y H:i:s \G\M\T'))
harness.check: out is None or (out.year == inp[2].year and out.month == inp[2].month and out.day == inp[2].day and out.hour == inp[2].hour and out.minute == inp[2].minute and out.second == inp[2].second)
